HEAD is now at 33ad4201 Fix forward truth runner: restore time import for SRE integration
33ad4201fccabeed5164f1b95b61efa054d06241

steps.systemctl_cat_service:
# /etc/systemd/system/alpaca-forward-truth-contract.service
[Unit]
Description=Alpaca forward truth contract — rolling strict gate, bounded additive repair, CERT_OK or INCIDENT
After=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
WorkingDirectory=/root/stock-bot
ExecStart=/bin/bash /root/stock-bot/deploy/systemd/alpaca-forward-truth-contract-run.sh
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal
steps.systemctl_cat_timer:
# /etc/systemd/system/alpaca-forward-truth-contract.timer
[Unit]
Description=Every 15 minutes — Alpaca forward truth contract runner

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*-*-* *:00,15,30,45:00
Persistent=true
AccuracySec=1min
Unit=alpaca-forward-truth-contract.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
